qa_pairs.question_text: Where do you currently live? (City and state)
What is your current occupation or primary activity?
What is your approximate monthly household income range?
What is your household composition?
What languages do you primarily consume content in? And for product ads and personal care content, do you prefer the same language or a different one?
How would you describe your personality in 3-5 words?
How comfortable are you trying new brands or products you haven't used before?
How much do you care about how you smell to others throughout the day? Is grooming more about feeling good yourself, or about how others perceive you, or both?
When you're getting ready for the day, do you find yourself more focused on choosing a scent that you love personally, or one that you think others will find appealing?
How much attention do you pay to how your skin looks and feels on a daily basis?
When buying any personal care product, rank these factors from most to least important:
How important is it to you that a product is 'natural' or 'chemical-free'? And what does 'natural' mean to you in your own words?
Which certifications or labels influence your purchase? Select all that apply.
How do you feel about Indian personal care brands vs. international brands? Do you have a preference or bias?
qa_pairs.answer_text: Price and quality matter; no specific preference

qa_pairs.question_text: When considering price and quality, do you find that Indian or international brands tend to offer better value for you personally?
Could you share an example of an Indian brand that you feel delivers great quality for its price compared to an international one?
What is the maximum premium (%) you would pay for a product that aligns with your values? Rate each separately:
qa_pairs.answer_text: {"Sustainable/eco-friendly packaging":"0","Ayurvedic or traditional ingredients":"0","Clinical-grade, lab-tested formulation":"10_20","Cruelty-free, not tested on animals":"0","Made in India":"10_20"}

qa_pairs.question_text: How loyal are you to personal care brands?
When your current body wash/soap runs out, what is your typical next step?
Where do you most often buy personal care products? Pick your top 3:
How much do you typically spend on a single body wash purchase?
What would make you switch away from your current body wash? Pick your top 3:
Describe the last time you tried a completely new body wash brand. What triggered the switch? Were you satisfied?
qa_pairs.answer_text: Last tried a new brand because my old one was out of stock. Was satisfied.

qa_pairs.question_text: What was it about the new body wash that made you feel satisfied after trying it?
When shopping online for personal care, what do you look at first? Pick your top 3:
Do you use quick commerce (Blinkit, Zepto, Swiggy Instamart) for personal care? If yes, does the limited selection change what you buy?
qa_pairs.answer_text: Yes; would buy a close substitute from limited selection

qa_pairs.question_text: How many times a day do you typically shower/bathe?
Walk me through your typical bathing routine step by step. What products do you use and in what order?
Could you share the order in which you use these products during your shower?
Do you typically rinse off completely between each product, or do you apply them one after the other without rinsing?
Do you currently use body wash, bar soap, or both? What drives that choice?
How would you describe your relationship with bathing/grooming?
What specific skin concerns, if any, do you have? Select all that apply.
Do other household members use the same body wash as you? Who decides what to buy?
qa_pairs.answer_text: Yes, shared. I decide what to buy.

qa_pairs.question_text: What fragrance families do you naturally gravitate toward? Pick your top 2:
Name a specific product whose fragrance you loved. Did you repurchase it because of the scent? What made that fragrance special to you?
qa_pairs.answer_text: A Nivea product; loved the fragrance. Don't remember what specifically made it special.

qa_pairs.question_text: Do you recall if it was more of an oceanic or musky scent, given your preference for those families?
How long should a body wash fragrance last on your skin?
How important is lather/foam to your body wash experience?
What texture do you prefer in a body wash?
What is your ideal post-wash skin feeling?
Do you prefer packaging that looks:
What body wash brand(s) do you currently use? List all.
What do you like MOST about your current body wash? (Top 1-2 things)
What, if anything, frustrates you or feels 'just okay' about your current body wash?
Is there anything about the texture or how it feels on your skin that you wish could be improved?
qa_pairs.answer_text: Three key things: (1) granular texture in the liquid, (2) cooling sensation during use, (3) no stickiness left on skin after wash

qa_pairs.question_text: What body wash brands can you name off the top of your head? List as many as you can.
How would you categorize body washes in your mind? What makes one different from another?
Have you tried any of these newer/D2C body wash brands? Rate your experience for any you've used:
If you could design your PERFECT body wash from scratch, describe it. Think about fragrance, texture, benefit, packaging, price — anything.
qa_pairs.answer_text: Fragrance: ocean. Texture: slightly granular, thick liquid. Packaging: don't care. Price: moderately premium.

qa_pairs.question_text: Could you share what specific benefits you would want from this body wash, beyond the packaging and price?
qa_pairs.answer_text: Should moisturize dry skin and improve skin appearance

qa_pairs.question_text: What claims or product descriptions on a body wash would make you stop and read more? Pick top 3:
What is the most you have ever paid for a body wash? What was it and was it worth it?
qa_pairs.answer_text: Highest paid: ~_300 for a large pack. Worth it due to price-to-size ratio and smell.

qa_pairs.question_text: Would you be interested in a body wash specifically formulated for Indian skin types and hard water conditions?
Where do you typically discover new personal care products? Pick your top 3:
Who do you follow or trust in the personal care space on social media? Name specific ones and what makes you trust them.
When you see personal care products on TV or in-store, what kind of endorsements or signs make you feel confident about trying them?
Are there specific review platforms or trusted sources you rely on for these ratings when deciding on a new product?
qa_pairs.answer_text: Relies on ratings from the purchase platform itself

qa_pairs.question_text: Have you ever bought a personal care product because you saw it on social media? Describe what happened.
Is there something specific about social media platforms that makes you hesitant to trust them for product recommendations?
